overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street in rainy conditions. The camera moves along a sidewalk past construction scaffolding, under an elevated highway, and approaches a police checkpoint with NCPD vehicles and crime scene tape. The scene features neon-lit billboards, wet reflective streets, and dense urban architecture characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a building under active construction with orange scaffolding

notable_agents.action: child in orange shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: orange metal scaffolding structure covering the building facade with bright work lights
large vertical digital billboard displaying 'AVANTE' advertisement with figures
gray concrete building wall with small windows and industrial appearance
elevated highway or monorail structure overhead creating a covered environment

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow covered sidewalk next to a building under construction. Orange scaffolding with bright work lights dominates the right side, while a large digital billboard is visible on the left building. The atmosphere is dark and urban with wet pavement reflecting artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk under elevated highway

events.description: exits the construction scaffolding area into a wider covered sidewalk under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass among other pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing purple umbrella walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible on the right side of the sidewalk
multiple large digital billboards mounted on the building facade displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Moving past the construction zone, the scene opens into a wider sidewalk still covered by the overpass structure. Palm trees appear on the right, and more pedestrians are visible, some carrying umbrellas. Digital billboards line the left side of the street, and vehicles pass by on the wet road.

events.description: NCPD police car comes into view parked at the intersection checkpoint
crossing the street at the crosswalk approaching the police barrier

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while approaching the police checkpoint with flashing lights

notable_agents.action: futuristic NCPD police car with illuminated POLICE text parked at the checkpoint

entered.detail: futuristic black and white police vehicle with glowing blue POLICE lettering on the side
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
skyscraper with illuminated windows and corporate logo visible on the facade

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a more open intersection area. An NCPD police car is parked on the right with its lights flashing. The camera crosses the street at the crosswalk, approaching a police checkpoint with yellow crime scene tape. Tall glass buildings with neon signage rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: police crime scene checkpoint with barrier tape

events.description: arriving at the police checkpoint with yellow and black crime scene tape blocking the area
pedestrian with glowing green umbrella briefly passes in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking past the police officer and crime scene tape at the checkpoint, observing the restricted area

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer in blue uniform standing guard behind the crime scene tape

entered.detail: yellow and black striped barrier tape stretched across the sidewalk blocking access
police officer standing near the tape with hands behind back
row of vending machines against the building wall near the checkpoint
large industrial ventilation fans on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the police checkpoint with yellow crime scene tape stretched across the sidewalk. An NCPD officer stands guard as the camera walks past. The area includes vending machines and industrial ventilation grilles on the building, with the police car now visible further back on the right. The wet pavement continues to reflect the neon city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk district that transitions from a cramped construction zone into an open, police-guarded intersection. It begins on a narrow covered sidewalk dominated by orange scaffolding and bright work lights, with wet pavement reflecting a large digital billboard on the left. As the camera moves past the construction area, the space opens into a wider walkway beneath an overpass where palm trees and pedestrians with umbrellas appear alongside passing vehicles. The scene then emerges from the cover of the overpass into a bright intersection, crossing a street toward a flashing NCPD police car and yellow crime scene tape. Finally, the camera approaches the checkpoint, passing a standing officer and industrial vending machines while the surrounding glass skyscrapers and neon signage glow against the dark, rainy sky.
